3118720.name: My Fantasy Hostess Club Demo
3118720.description: Help Yuki manage Opulence Haven Hostess Club in My Fantasy Hostess Club's demo! This demo features the 2nd level found from the main game where you are limited to advertising Opulence and hosting Club Meets. Don't forget to expand your Club's rooms and make it easier to host your noble customers in the lobby. How you host will shape the fate of Opulence Haven!
3118720.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
